op_label: Op 53 (Wave 3 — site-agnostic capture bridge; contract freeze + pairing auth + E2E close)
supersedes_note: Op 53 supersedes Op 52. Wave 2 backend/extension foundation largely MERGED since Op 52: backend #500–#503, #505–#507; extension #1 (capture ring buffer) + #2 (DESIGN v0.3). Dark-route ordering resolved via #503 (R-DARK-1 middleware) — Option A shipped. Product model restated: SITE-AGNOSTIC JSON capture on ANY competitor site (not per-platform mapped tooling). Open critical path: backend #504 contract freeze (CI green, dual-lens pending), extension #3 pairing auth (local gates green; PR CI banned-token step red on pull_request event only).

headline_status.current_op: Op 53 — live state refreshed; executing v0.1 close: dual-lens+#504 merge → fix/merge extension #3 → site-agnostic capture→ingest wire-up → mobile pair UI → staging flags → dogfood

product_model.identity: Chrome extension is a SITE-AGNOSTIC data bridge. It captures JSON as it loads on ANY competitor coaching site under the coach's own browser session, then posts envelopes to TGP scout ingest bound to the coach via pairing.
product_model.not_this: Not a per-site mapped importer suite. Not server-side credential scraping. Not TrueCoach-only forever.
product_model.day1_verification_surface: TrueCoach remains the flagship verification surface because shapes are locked from live captures (2026-06-30), but the capture ring buffer + generic entity envelope are the product core and must work host-agnostically.
flow: 1. Coach taps Import in TGP mobile
2. Mobile mints 6-digit pairing code (POST /api/extension/pair/init) bound to coach + optional chosen_platform hint
3. Coach installs/opens extension, enters code (POST /api/extension/pair/redeem) → coach-bound session
4. Coach navigates ANY competitor site while signed in there
5. Extension ring-buffer captures JSON responses as they load (debugger/CDP path)
6. Envelopes POST /api/scout/ingest; progress mirrors via /api/scout/progress; terminal /api/scout/ingest/complete
7. Mobile shows luxury progress; coach reviews/commits later

immutable_doctrine_in_force.R3_authorship: Every commit shows Bradley Gleave <bradley@bradleytgpcoaching.com> as author AND committer.
immutable_doctrine_in_force.R3_CLARIFY_1_2026_07_06: R3 forbidden-token scan uses word-boundary anchored patterns only.
immutable_doctrine_in_force.R14_R15_no_merge_without_clean: No PR merges until CLEAN of P0-P3.
immutable_doctrine_in_force.R72_dual_lens: All P0-P3 PRs require parallel dual-lens adversarial review before merge.
immutable_doctrine_in_force.R80_envelope_source_of_truth: extractors/_interface.js entity envelope is source of truth; backend DTOs MUST match. Capture path is site-agnostic; platform extractors are optional specialization, not the product.
immutable_doctrine_in_force.R124_sha_verify_both_ways: gh api head.sha MUST match local git rev-parse HEAD before merge.
immutable_doctrine_in_force.R138_autonomy: Agent may squash-merge after dual-lens CLEAN + CI green without human approval.
